title: PROVIDENCE CHILDREN'S DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE - 211info
text: PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER PROVIDENCE CHILDREN'S DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides physical, occupational, and speech therapies, autism therapy, feeding and nutrition services, audiology, and neurodevelopmental assessments. 830 NE 47th Avenue Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 215-2240 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 215-2240 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Financial assistance program available for those who qualify. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fee. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7am-5:30pm Services: Auditory Training * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Autism Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Occupational Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Pediatric Developmental Assessment Pediatric Feeding Disorders Programs Physical Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Speech Therapy * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CENTER FOR MEDICALLY FRAGILE CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SWINDELLS RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PROVIDENCE CHILD CENTER
